title: Phymatopsis trisecta
taxonomy: Phymatopsis trisecta is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to Australia and New Zealand. The classification of Phymatopsis trisecta includes its placement within the plant kingdom as a vascular plant, specifically as a type of fern. Phymatopsis trisecta is further classified as a member of the division Pteridophyta, which is the group of vascular plants that are characterized by the production of spores.
